title: Chapter 3
text: AUTHOR NOTE Hello reader friend, If you haven’t read my books before, you might not know this, but I write darker stories that can be upsetting and disturbing. My books and main characters aren't for the faint of heart. This book contains primal kink, somnophilia and mentions of childhood trauma. I trust you know your triggers before you proceed. God of Ruin is a complete STANDALONE. For more things Rina Kent, visit www.rinakent.com
